diagrams.title: Randomized Select Partitioning Example
diagrams.description: Shows how array [7,2,9,3,5,1,8] gets partitioned around pivot 5
diagrams.purpose: Understand the partition operation and how it reduces problem size

diagrams.title: Recursion Tree Comparison - Randomized Select vs QuickSort
diagrams.description: Shows how Randomized Select only explores one branch while QuickSort explores both
elements: Left and right partitions after first pivot
Randomized Select: one branch faded (not explored)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize why Randomized Select is faster than QuickSort for selection problems

diagrams.title: Best, Average, Worst Case Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows three scenarios of pivot selection and their impact on recursion depth
diagrams.purpose: Understand time complexity variations and why random pivot prevents worst case
